items.name: Emerald Shadow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌟 Step into mystery and style with a coat that commands attention!
This deep emerald trench coat combines a sleek futuristic design with sharp tailored lines, giving your avatar a bold and cinematic presence. The glossy finish and dramatic long cut make it perfect for adventurers, heroes, or anyone who wants to stand out in Roblox worlds.

💡 Why You’ll Love It
Rich emerald green with a striking glossy texture
Long trench design for a dramatic, stylish look
Perfect for roleplay, battles, or futuristic city adventures
High-quality detailing with realistic folds and metallic edges

🔍 Keywords: trench coat, emerald coat, futuristic coat, green jacket, hero outfit, stylish cloak, cyberpunk coat, fantasy robe, adventure outfit, Roblox clothing

Unleash your inner legend with this powerful coat!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.description:
🎼 Elegance in Every Note, Style in Every Step!
This flowing white coat is inspired by classical sophistication, featuring violin-shaped accents along the waist for a truly artistic touch. Its pristine design blends fashion with music, making it perfect for roleplay, concerts, or stylish avatars who want to stand out.

💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant white flowing design with musical details 🎻
Unique violin-inspired accents for a creative aesthetic
Perfect for formal roleplay, concerts, or fantasy outfits
A statement piece that combines art, music, and fashion

🔍 Keywords: coat, white, elegant, violin, music, classical, roleplay, artistic, fashion, PBR

items.name: 🖤「Midnight Crest Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A timeless black coat with shining silver buttons, echoing the dignity of tradition and the edge of modern rebellion.
Whether you wear it as a symbol of discipline or as a statement of cool defiance, this coat will make you stand tall in style.
✨ Features
Sleek black fabric with PBR depth
Silver button details for contrast
Traditional cut with a modern vibe
Perfect for dramatic, cool avatars
🔍 Keywords: black coat, Japanese style, retro, formal, cool
